title: T-022 — QA-021 spec wizard (3-step) + edit mode (prototype parity)
prompt:
# T-022 — QA-021 spec wizard 3-step

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-021 wizard, §8.3 QUA-103 edit mode (draft only), §8.5 prototype spec_wizard
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `/quality/specs/new` and `/quality/specs/:id/edit` (draft-only) using the same SpecWizard 3-step Client Component (Header → Parameters → Review) backed by react-hook-form + Zod.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/SpecWizard.tsx` 3-step wizard: Step 1 Header (product, spec_code, applies_to, effective_from), Step 2 Parameters (CRUD list with parameter_type Select, min/target/max, unit, test_method, is_critical), Step 3 Review (read-only summary + Submit for review).
2. RHF + zodResolver enforces V-QA-SPEC-003 client-side; server re-validates.
3. Edit mode: hydrates from getSpecDraft(id); rejects when status!='draft'.
4. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:82-302` (spec_wizard).

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/specs/new/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/app/quality/specs/[id]/edit/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/SpecWizard.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/__tests__/SpecWizard.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the wizard renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:82-302, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (3-step stepper at top + step content panel + Back/Next/Submit footer in same order), visuals (shadcn Tabs or stepper, Form, Input, Select, Switch for is_critical, Button only — no native select), and interaction (Next disabled until current step valid, Back preserves entered data, Submit only on Step 3, edit mode rejects when status!='draft' with toast key qa.spec.edit_locked) — verified by RTL test plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given a parameter row with min_value=10 and max_value=5, when Next is clicked on Step 2, then the row shows V-QA-SPEC-003 error and Next remains disabled
3. Given edit mode for a spec with status='active', when the page loads, then it shows 'qa.spec.edit_locked' toast and redirects to /quality/specs/:id (read-only)

pipeline_inputs.description: 3-step spec wizard (Header/Parameters/Review) with edit-mode reuse for draft specs; parity with prototype spec_wizard.
pipeline_inputs.details: Client Component RHF wizard with zodResolver. Step 1 header fields, Step 2 parameter array (useFieldArray) with parameter_type Select and is_critical Switch, Step 3 read-only review + submit. Edit mode rejects non-draft status with toast and redirect. shadcn primitives only per translation notes. Honor BL-QA-07 deferred (no real-time autocomplete in P1).
out_of_scope: Do not implement spec sign modal (T-024)
Do not implement allergen profile snapshot (T-020)
acceptance_criteria: Given the wizard renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:82-302, then it has parity on structure (3-step stepper + step content + Back/Next/Submit footer in same order), visuals (shadcn Tabs/Form/Input/Select/Switch/Button only, no native select), and interaction (Next disabled until step valid, Back preserves data, edit mode rejects when status!='draft' with toast qa.spec.edit_locked) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given a parameter row with min_value=10 and max_value=5, when Next is clicked on Step 2, then the row shows V-QA-SPEC-003 error and Next remains disabled
Given edit mode for a spec with status='active', when the page loads, then it shows the qa.spec.edit_locked toast and redirects to /quality/specs/:id
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/__tests__/SpecWizard.test.tsx asserting step structure, V-QA-SPEC-003 client validation, edit-mode redirect
risk_red_lines: Do not skip server-side validation just because client validates
Do not allow edit on non-draft status (must clone-to-new-version per QUA-103)
Do not use native HTML select per translation notes
